title: The Galloping Major
writer: Basil Radford, Monja Danischewsky, Henry Cornelius
actors: Basil Radford, Jimmy Hanley, Janette Scott
plot: A syndicate is set up by a horse lover to buy a particular racehorse, but they accidentally buy the wrong horse. The horse is useless on the flat, so they decide to enter him as a jumper.
